scripts.dev: bunx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,web,diff -c blue,green,magenta "cd server && bun run dev" "cd client && bun run dev" "cd cardinal-diff && bun run dev"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n server,client,diff,store -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "cd server && bun run typecheck" "cd client && bun run typecheck" "cd cardinal-diff && bun run typecheck" "cd cardinal-store && bun run typecheck"
scripts.lint: concurrently -n root,server,client,diff,store -c white,blue,green,magenta,yellow "bun run biome:check" "cd server && bun run lint" "cd client && bun run lint" "cd cardinal-diff && bun run lint" "cd cardinal-store && bun run lint"
scripts.lint:fix: concurrently -n root,server,client,diff,store -c white,blue,green,magenta,yellow "bun run biome:fix" "cd server && bun run lint:fix" "cd client && bun run lint:fix" "cd cardinal-diff && bun run lint:fix" "cd cardinal-store && bun run lint:fix"
scripts.test: concurrently -n server,client,diff,store -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "cd server && bun run test" "cd client && bun run test" "cd cardinal-diff && bun run test" "cd cardinal-store && bun run test"
scripts.check: bun run biome:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test
